text:
*[Bug 19029] Overly-long dlerror() may corrupt dyn.load() state*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19029>

Bill Denney (<mailto:bill.r-project@denney.ws|bill.r-project@denney.ws>) changed:

           What    |Removed                     |Added
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
                 CC|                            |bill.r-project@denney.ws

--- Comment #1 from Bill Denney (<mailto:bill.r-project@denney.ws|bill.r-project@denney.ws>) ---
This issue recently affected me when I was trying to confirm package build on
GitHub Mac continuous integration (tough when I don't have a Mac to confirm it
on).
